scored_papers.title: Expectation Pauli-Lubanski vector and intrinsic angular momentum of relativistic wavepackets
scored_papers.abstract: In non-relativistic mechanics, the total (orbital) angular momentum (AM) of a spatially-distributed system can be decomposed into intrinsic and extrinsic contributions. In relativistic quantum mechanics, intrinsic AM is typically associated with spin, which can be described using the Pauli-Lubanski four-vector. Here, we develop a unified formalism that combines the main features of both approaches and describes the intrinsic AM of a relativistic wavepacket, including both spin and orbital contributions.
scored_papers.reason: 🎯 相対論的波束の固有角運動量を「期待値版 Pauli-Lubanski」で再構築、Bliokh 単著。波束形式の中核に直撃する内容です
scored_papers.summary: 📐 波束のエネルギー重心まわりに spin + 軌道 AM を統合定義。零質量特異性が消え、massless 粒子でも AM が運動量に非平行になる ✨

scored_papers.title: Entropic Reciprocity in Time-Reversed Young Interferometry
scored_papers.abstract: We show that time-reversed Young interferometry reorganizes, rather than reverses, optical entropy. A fixed detector conditions the reciprocal source--detector Green function and produces a source-label probability distribution. Marginal entropies in the standard and time-reversed geometries are generally unequal; the reciprocal invariant is instead the mutual information between source and detector coordinates.
scored_papers.reason: 🔄 時間反転 Young 干渉計で「相反不変量」が source-detector 相互情報量になる話。ダブルスリット派には刺さるはず ✨
scored_papers.summary: 📊 固定検出器が source-label 分布を条件付ける → 破壊的応答近傍で条件エントロピー減 + Fisher 情報増 🌀

scored_papers.title: Fixed-detector tilt-defocus sensing by upstream source coding in a time-reversed Young interferometer
scored_papers.abstract: We propose a physically explicit sensing application of a time-reversed Young (TRY) interferometer: simultaneous monitoring of beam tilt and focus drift with a fixed detector. Using a finite-width double-slit Fresnel model, we derive the exact local TRY response functions for tilt-like and defocus-like phase perturbations and compute the corresponding optimal upstream source codes numerically.
scored_papers.reason: 🎛️ 有限幅ダブルスリット Fresnel モデルで TRY 干渉計を tilt + defocus センサに転用。実装寄りで実験との接続が見える
scored_papers.summary: 🔬 上流ソース符号化で 2 スカラーに局所 Fisher 情報を凝縮 ✨ 単一検出器で同時監視、下流マッチドモードと比較 📐

scored_papers.title: Probing Quantum Entanglement in tau+tau- Pairs via the pi pi Channel at STCF
scored_papers.abstract: Quantum entanglement and Bell-inequality violation in tau+tau- pairs provide a sensitive probe of quantum correlations in high-energy interactions. We present a feasibility study of e+e- to tau+tau- at the proposed Super Tau-Charm Facility based on full Monte Carlo simulation at sqrt(s) = 7 GeV, focusing on the pi pi channel which offers the maximal spin-analyzing power and the simplest final-state topology for validating the quantum-tomography framework.
scored_papers.reason: ⚛️ 衝突型実験での粒子対エンタングルメント検証。コライダーでの Bell test という方向性に直結 🎯
scored_papers.summary: 🔬 STCF で e+e- → τ+τ- → π+π- を full MC で feasibility 評価、再構成 concurrence 0.279 ± 0.007 を達成 ✨

scored_papers.title: Automated experimental design for high-probability entanglement generation
scored_papers.abstract: Entangled photons are widely used in quantum technologies. Many photonic experiments generate them with probabilistic photon-pair sources that can be modeled as squeeze operators. In practice, these sources are usually treated in the low-gain (perturbative) regime, keeping only the leading single-pair term and neglecting higher-order multi-pair emission events. Here we develop an automated design algorithm for quantum experiments to optimize both fidelity and success probability while accounting for higher-order multi-pair emissions.
scored_papers.reason: 🎲 SPDC 系の squeeze operator を perturbative 越えで扱う自動設計アルゴリズム。高次多対放出を「敵」じゃなく「味方」にする発想 ✨
scored_papers.summary: 🔍 トポロジー探索 + パラメータ最適化で fidelity と成功確率を両立、Bell / W / NOON で従来提案を上回る性能 📈
